roulette.title: Hash_Roulette
roulette.meta_description: Russian Roulette with crypto. High stakes, provably fair randomness. Last player standing wins the pot.
roulette.tagline: Last player standing wins the pot.
roulette.game_table_not_found: Table not found or failed to load.
roulette.metadata_card_description: Configuration and settings for the Roulette contract
roulette.tables_description: Browse open and active tables, or create your own.
roulette.active_tables_description: Tables you are currently participating in.
roulette.active_table_waiting_ready: Waiting for all players to be ready...
roulette.timers_vrf_timed_out: The random number request has timed out.
roulette.timers_vrf_explanation: If the server doesn't deliver randomness within {minutes} minutes, you can cancel the table and enable refunds.
roulette.timers_turn_can_be_eliminated_self: If you don't play within {minutes} minutes, you can be eliminated.
roulette.timers_turn_can_be_eliminated_other: If they don't play within {minutes} minutes, they can be eliminated.
roulette.create_table_description: Set up a new table with your preferred settings
roulette.create_table_initial_bet_help: The minimum bet required to play a turn
roulette.create_table_max_increment_help: Maximum amount players can increase their bet by (0 = no limit)
roulette.admin_set_min_description: Update the minimum bet amount required to play.
roulette.admin_set_max_description: Update the maximum bet amount allowed per table.
roulette.admin_set_gas_description: Update the gas limit for VRF callback function.
roulette.admin_withdraw_description: Withdraw accumulated fees to the fee collector address.
roulette.admin_pause_description: Emergency pause to prevent new tables from being created.
roulette.game_controls_connect_wallet_to_join: Connect your wallet to join the table.
roulette.game_controls_waiting_more_players: Waiting for more players to join...
roulette.game_controls_mark_ready_to_start: Mark yourself as ready to start.
roulette.game_controls_ready_waiting_others: You're ready! Waiting for other players...
roulette.game_controls_eliminated_message: You have been eliminated from this game. Watch the remaining players compete for the pot.
roulette.game_controls_waiting_random: Waiting for random number from server...
roulette.game_controls_forfeit_warning: Leaving during a game will forfeit all your bets in this table.
roulette.game_controls_congrats_claim_winnings: Congratulations! You're the last player standing. Claim your winnings.
roulette.game_controls_refund_cancelled: The table was cancelled. You can claim a refund for your bets.
roulette.game_controls_refund_all_eliminated: All players were eliminated. You can claim a refund for your bets.
roulette.game_controls_winnings_claimed: Winnings have been claimed by the winner.
roulette.game_controls_eliminated_better_luck: You were eliminated. Better luck next time!
roulette.instructions_step_create_or_join: Create a new table or join an existing open table.
roulette.instructions_step_mark_ready: Mark yourself as ready when you are prepared to start the game. When all players are ready, the game will begin.
roulette.instructions_step_your_turn: During your turn, pick a number 0-9 and your bet. Then play your move. If your number matches the roulette random outcome, you are eliminated.
roulette.instructions_step_next_player: The next player's turn begins after the previous player has played their move. They must match the same bet amount as the previous player (or increase the bet) to stay in the game.
roulette.instructions_step_until_one_left: The game continues until only one player remains. The last player standing wins the entire pot.
roulette.instructions_step_claim_winnings: If you win, remember to claim your winnings from the User Bets section!
